title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm overjoyed to receive so many.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll decorate my room with them and send my
parents a picture. Hehe! I have so many new
friends.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That said, I haven't the space for this many
plushies in my room.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They should fit if I rearrange my furniture and
make more efficient use of the room's space.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must return home and take measurements. This
will be fun.
